title: oracc_get_edition data payload
description: Structured payload for the `oracc_get_edition` tool. PRIMARY: reads corpusjson/<ID>.json from the cached build-oracc bundle, parses it via parseCdl (preserving nonw dividers / scribal deletions / erasure markup), and ATTACHES genre/period/provenience from the bundle's catalogue.json. FALLBACK: live per-text TEI (saao P-ids, rinap Q-ids; reuses the get_oracc_text parser) when the id is absent from the bundle. `found=false` with a precise warning when neither channel resolves. CDL/bundle editions carry NO translation (translation block_count = 0); TEI editions do.

channel.description: Which channel served the edition: 'bundle' (build-oracc CDL, metadata attaches), 'tei' (live per-text TEI XML fallback), or 'corpusjson' (legacy opendata fast-path).

title.description: Edition title (catalogue designation / TEI header, or text id).

cdli_id.description: Cross-reference into CDLI (catalogue.json cdli_id for the bundle channel, or TEI header). May equal `text_id`.

cached.description: true when the parsed edition was served from the on-disk cache.
